title: Karpatiosorbus cochleariformis
taxonomy: Karpatiosorbus cochleariformis is a species within the family Rosaceae. It is classified as a member of the genus Karpatiosorbus. Karpatiosorbus cochleariformis is part of the order Rosales, which is a group of flowering plants. Further classification places it as a member of the clade Rosidae. This classification is based on its morphological and molecular characteristics.
